/usr/bin/clang++  -Wall -Werror -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/GainesvilleRoadNavigator.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GainesvilleRoadNavigator.dir/src/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GainesvilleRoadNavigator.dir/src/graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GainesvilleRoadNavigator.dir/src/dijkstra.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GainesvilleRoadNavigator.dir/src/astar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GainesvilleRoadNavigator.dir/src/distance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GainesvilleRoadNavigator.dir/src/minHeap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GainesvilleRoadNavigator.dir/src/router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GainesvilleRoadNavigator.dir/src/kdTree.cpp.o -o GainesvilleRoadNavigator
